sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40936" key="e)pispilo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισπῐλόω</orth>, <sense id="n40936.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make spotty,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).154</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
